transcript.content: Can you match $95 per unit? Budget constraints are tightening.
Honestly, our BATNA is 9500 so we need you to beat that.
$95 is at our cost. We can do $100 with modified shipping terms.
$100 per unit, standard shipping instead of express.
Let me check with logistics. This might work since we have inventory buffer.
Take your time. We value this relationship.
